allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
🔧 Add required development tools configuration and automation

Implement CTB Doctrine v1.3.2 requirement for 5 mandatory development tools across all repositories.

New Tools Configuration:
- Grafana (04.05.01) - Monitoring & observability dashboards
- GitHub Projects (04.05.02) - Project management integration  
- GitKraken (04.05.03) - Visual git client for CTB navigation
- Obsidian (04.05.04) - Documentation & knowledge management
- Eraser.io (04.05.05) - Technical diagramming & architecture

New Files:
- global-config/required_tools.yaml - Tool specifications with doctrine IDs
- global-config/scripts/verify_required_tools.sh - Automated verification
- global-config/scripts/install_required_tools.sh - Cross-platform installer
- docs/TOOLS_SETUP_GUIDE.md - Comprehensive setup documentation

Updated Files:
- global-config/scripts/dev_setup.sh (v1.1) - Added tool verification step
- global-config/scripts/update_from_imo_creator.sh - Syncs tool configs
- global-config/QUICK_REFERENCE.md - Added tools reference section

Auto-Propagation:
When child repos run "update from imo-creator", they receive:
- Tool configuration and verification scripts
- Installation automation for Windows/Mac/Linux
- Complete setup guide with troubleshooting

All tools integrate with CTB branch structure for monitoring, documentation, 
and visualization workflows across the altitude levels.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
